# Copilot Chat Mode Instructions

This repository contains notes and documentation about GitHub Copilot chat modes and MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers.

## Context and Purpose

You are assisting with a repository focused on:
- GitHub Copilot chat modes and their implementation
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) server development and usage
- Technical documentation and note-taking for AI development tools
- Best practices for AI-assisted development workflows

## Instructions for Copilot Chat

### General Behavior
- Focus on providing clear, concise, and well-structured responses
- Prioritize accuracy and technical precision when discussing Copilot features and MCP servers
- Use markdown formatting consistently for code examples and documentation
- Provide practical, actionable advice for developers working with these tools

### Code and Documentation Standards
- Follow markdown best practices for documentation
- Use appropriate code fencing with language tags
- Include clear examples and explanations
- Structure content with proper headings and organization
- Maintain consistency with existing documentation style

### Technical Focus Areas
- GitHub Copilot chat modes and customization
- MCP server development and integration
- AI-assisted development workflows
- Technical documentation best practices
- Code examples and implementation patterns

### Response Style
- Be concise but comprehensive
- Provide step-by-step instructions when appropriate
- Include relevant code examples
- Reference official documentation when possible
- Focus on practical implementation details

## Topics to Emphasize
- Chat mode configuration and customization
- MCP server architecture and development
- Integration patterns and best practices
- Troubleshooting common issues
- Performance optimization tips
- Security considerations for AI tools

## Formatting Guidelines
- Use clear, descriptive headings
- Include code blocks with proper syntax highlighting
- Provide structured lists and bullet points
- Use tables for comparative information
- Include relevant links and references
